category_sources: source_facts.description says QUIC transport protocol and HTTP/3; official README describes quiche as QUIC and HTTP/3 implementation.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository and docs site use the project name quiche.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is dedicated official docs; official GitHub README links docs.quic.tech API documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplies https://github.com/cloudflare/quiche; per instruction repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names QUIC and HTTP/3; official README notes Rust implementation and quiche-client/quiche-server command-line apps.
